overall.description: Nighttime driving sequence through foggy highways and a massive suspension bridge in a futuristic cyberpunk city. The footage transitions from urban highway to desert outskirts featuring a neon motel sign, then ascends a bridge with red warning lights toward an illuminated metropolitan skyline. Game engine footage with atmospheric volumetric fog and neon lighting.

segments.scene_description: Driving on a multi-lane highway enveloped in thick fog, illuminated by overhead streetlights. The camera follows a car with glowing red taillights, passing under a large overhead sign gantry while billboards are visible on the right side.

passing the illuminated spherical Sunset motel sign on the right

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a desert highway with rocky terrain visible on both sides. A prominent spherical neon sign for the Sunset motel appears on the right, while the road continues through sparse desert landscape with occasional billboards.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle ascends onto a massive suspension bridge marked by red warning lights on tall towers. Through the fog, a futuristic city skyline emerges with skyscrapers covered in neon billboards. A green sports car overtakes on the left as the bridge cables frame the view.

segments.scene_description: Continuing across the bridge with moderate traffic, passing under overhead signs directing to Westbrook and Rocky Ridge. The camera navigates a slight right curve while the city skyline remains visible to the left, and bridge support columns with red lights line the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from a fog-shrouded urban highway into a desolate desert landscape before ascending toward a glowing futuristic metropolis. It begins on a multi-lane road enveloped in thick fog, following a car with glowing red taillights past overhead gantries and roadside billboards. As the environment opens up, the dense fog clears to reveal a rocky desert highway featuring a prominent spherical neon sign for the Sunset motel. The scene then shifts as the vehicle ascends a massive suspension bridge marked by red warning lights, where a green sports car overtakes on the left while a neon-lit city skyline emerges through the haze. Finally, the camera navigates a slight right curve across the bridge, passing overhead signs for Westbrook and Rocky Ridge as the towering skyscrapers remain visible to the left.
